name: The AI Scientist
positioning: An end-to-end prototype for automated research idea generation, experimentation, and paper writing
why_it_matters: It made the concept of autonomous research workflows concrete for a broad technical audience
relation: A reference point for agentic systems that attempt to complete more than one stage of the research loop
representative: The AI Scientist paper and project release

name: OpenHands
positioning: A general software agent platform with strong implications for experiment and research automation
why_it_matters: It contributes reusable infrastructure for tool-using agents that can support research tasks
relation: Useful for building paper-to-code and experiment-execution workflows
representative: OpenHands benchmark demos and agent framework

name: gpt-researcher
positioning: A focused research assistant for multi-source web research and report generation
why_it_matters: It is one of the clearest open implementations of literature-style autonomous synthesis
relation: Relevant to literature-review agents and retrieval-driven research workflows
representative: GPT Researcher open-source project and docs
